_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Systems integration involves identifying points of connection between different systems and processes, or opportunities to combine them, and designing how the components communicate.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, IT infrastructure, business units, and vendor organizations to maintain effective data service delivery.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.388), AI-K-016 (AI, cosine: 0.376).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.630). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [combine, communicate, components, connection, designing, different] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.863, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.7%). "Systems integration involves identifying points of connection between different" and "Ability to build cross-functional operational partnerships between data teams, I" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.440 < STS 0.630 (gap -0.191). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [combine, communicate, components] and [ability, build, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [combine, communicate, components, connection, designing, different]. WIDAI terms: [ability, build, business, cross, data, delivery].
